narrative:
White Eyes / Adams (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,134 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.7 percentage points.
